metadata.description: Brian home server skill marketplace for the Leatherwood family

plugins.name: grocery-list
plugins.description: Shared family grocery list — add, remove, and view items

plugins.name: recipes
plugins.description: Family recipe storage — add, search, import from URL, and retrieve recipes

plugins.name: prescriptions
plugins.description: Private medication, prescription, vitamin, and supplement tracker — each person sees only their own list

plugins.name: health
plugins.description: Private personal health aggregator — pulls data from prescriptions (and more sources over time) to produce a single health evaluation

plugins.name: jellyfin
plugins.description: Discover and queue movies and TV shows for the Jellyfin library — new releases and acclaimed older content

plugins.name: food-log
plugins.description: Private daily food log — photograph your food-tracking app and Brian extracts items, macros, and totals. Each person's log is private.

plugins.name: roadmap
plugins.description: Personal project roadmap manager — registers projects in Brian memory and adds tasks directly to their GitHub ROADMAP.md files

plugins.name: meal-plan
plugins.description: Weekly family meal plan — builds a 7-day menu from saved recipes and pushes missing ingredients to the grocery list

plugins.name: vehicles
plugins.description: Shared family vehicle registry — service history, registration and insurance renewals, per-car notes

plugins.name: contacts
plugins.description: Shared family contact directory — emergency, medical providers and care team (including hospice / end-of-life), schools, service providers

plugins.name: maintenance
plugins.description: Home maintenance tracker — recurring tasks (HVAC, smoke detectors, gutters, seasonal) with last-done log and upcoming view

plugins.name: gifts
plugins.description: Birthday and gift idea tracker — per-person idea lists, given history, and upcoming birthday/anniversary reminders

plugins.name: travel
plugins.description: Family trip planner — trips with dates and travelers, itineraries, packing lists, and booking confirmations
